Home / Menu

Explore Our Full Menu at Desi Dhamaka Oak Tree

Menu

From fiery Andhra starters to rich Hyderabadi dum biryanis — browse everything
we serve fresh at our Oak Tree, NJ location.



















Soups

Veg Sweet Corn Soup

$7.99

A comforting blend of sweet corn, fresh vegetables, and rich broth — creamy, mildly seasoned, and soul-soothing in every spoonful.
Chicken Sweet Corn Soup

$7.99

Tender chicken and golden corn kernels simmered in a smooth, savory broth — the perfect balance of comfort and flavor.
Veg Manchow Soup

$7.99

A hot and spicy delight packed with crunchy vegetables and zesty flavors — finished with crispy noodles for that ultimate kick.
Chicken Manchow Soup

$7.99

A spicy, tangy Indo-Chinese favorite — loaded with shredded chicken, crunchy veggies, and topped with crispy noodles for that perfect crunch.
Veg Hot & Sour Soup

$7.99

A bold mix of tangy, spicy, and savory — packed with fresh vegetables and exotic Asian flavors to awaken your taste buds.
Chicken Hot & Sour Soup

$7.99

A fiery, tangy soup bursting with bold Indo-Chinese flavors — shredded chicken, veggies, and spice that warms you up instantly.
Natu Kodi Soup

$8.99

Authentic country chicken slow-cooked with bold spices and herbs — a traditional South Indian remedy that’s as flavorful as it is hearty.
Goat Paya (Aattukal) Soup

$8.99

Traditional bone broth made from slow-cooked goat trotters — rich, nourishing, and bursting with authentic homemade flavor.

Vegetarian Appetizers

Punjabi Samosa

$8.99

Golden, flaky samosas filled with spiced potato and peas — an all-time favorite Indian street snack.
Paneer Pepper Fry

$13.99

Soft paneer cubes tossed with black pepper, curry leaves, and aromatic masalas — fiery and flavorful in every bite.
Mushroom Pepper Fry

$12.99

Tender mushrooms tossed with black pepper, onions, and curry leaves — a spicy, earthy classic.
Baby Corn Pepper Fry

$12.99

Tender baby corn stir-fried with cracked pepper and spices — crisp, spicy, and full of flavor.
Gobi Pepper Fry

$12.99

Cauliflower florets roasted with crushed pepper and curry leaves — a spicy, earthy flavor explosion.
Corn Masala Fry

$12.99

Crispy golden corn sautéed with spicy masala, onions, and curry leaves — the perfect crunchy starter with a desi twist.
Gobi 65

$12.99

Crispy South Indian-style cauliflower fry seasoned with aromatic spices — crunchy, spicy, and bursting with flavor.
Hyderabad Paneer 65

$13.99

Signature Hyderabadi-style paneer fry — bold, spicy, and bursting with authentic South Indian flavors.
Paneer Pakoda

$13.99

Crispy golden fritters made with tender paneer dipped in seasoned gram-flour batter.
Onion Pakoda

$12.99

Golden-fried onion fritters seasoned with herbs and gram flour — crispy, aromatic, and perfect for any mood.
Spinach Pakoda

$12.99

Crispy spinach fritters seasoned with aromatic spices — light, crunchy, and irresistibly tasty.
Cashew Pakoda

$12.99

Crunchy cashew fritters fried to perfection — rich, nutty, and irresistibly crisp.
Chilli Baby Corn

$12.99

Crispy baby corn tossed in spicy chilli sauce with onions and bell peppers — hot, tangy, and addictive.
Chilli Gobi

$12.99

Crispy cauliflower florets coated in fiery chilli sauce — bold, tangy, and downright addictive.
Chilli Mushroom

$12.99

Juicy mushrooms tossed in hot chilli sauce with peppers and onions — tangy, spicy, and utterly satisfying.
Chilli Lotus Root

$13.99

Crunchy lotus root rings tossed in hot and tangy chilli sauce — a unique twist for spice lovers.
Chilli Paneer

$13.99

Classic Indo-Chinese delight — soft paneer chunks coated in spicy, tangy chilli sauce and sautéed to perfection.
Veg Manchurian

$12.99

Crispy veggie balls tossed in tangy, spicy Indo-Chinese sauce — a fusion favorite that never fails to impress.
Baby Corn Manchurian

$12.99

Golden-fried baby corn tossed in zesty Indo-Chinese sauce — crunchy, tangy, and full of flavor.
Lotus Root Manchurian

$13.99

Crispy lotus root tossed in bold Manchurian sauce — crunchy, saucy, and perfectly balanced.
Gobi Manchurian

$12.99

Crispy cauliflower florets wok-tossed in flavorful Manchurian sauce — spicy, saucy, and packed with crunch.
Paneer Manchurian

$13.99

Soft paneer cubes wok-tossed in flavorful Manchurian sauce — spicy, saucy, and crowd-favorite.
Mushroom Manchurian

$12.99

Crispy mushrooms coated in spicy, tangy Manchurian sauce — a perfect Indo-Chinese favorite.
Paneer 555

$13.99

A chef’s special fusion of crispy paneer and spicy seasoning — bold, flavorful, and perfectly addictive.
Gobi 555

$12.99

Crispy cauliflower tossed in fiery seasoning — a chef’s special creation that’s bold, spicy, and utterly addictive.
Baby Corn 555

$12.99

Crispy fried baby corn tossed in special 555 masala — spicy, crunchy, and full of flavor.
Mushroom 555

$12.99

Crispy mushrooms tossed in signature spicy seasoning — fiery, bold, and bursting with umami.
Vegetable Bullets

$13.99

Crispy veggie bites packed with flavor and spices — the perfect crunchy snack for spice lovers.
Paneer Burji Dry

$14.99

Scrambled paneer sautéed with onions, spices, and herbs — dry, flavorful, and perfectly spiced for every craving.
Paneer Majestic

$14.99

A royal appetizer made with golden-fried paneer tossed in creamy, spiced yogurt sauce — majestic in every sense.
Gobi Majestic

$13.99

Crispy cauliflower tossed in creamy, spiced yogurt sauce — a true majestic treat with a fusion kick.
Mushroom Majestic

$13.99

Golden-fried mushrooms coated in smooth, spiced yogurt-based sauce — rich, aromatic, and full of flavor.
Baby Corn Majestic

$13.99

Crispy baby corn tossed in a rich, creamy, and mildly spiced majestic sauce — an irresistible Indo-fusion treat.

Ameerpet Egg Fry

$13.99

Street-style masala egg fry loaded with onions, chilies, and signature Ameerpet spice.
Chilli Egg

$14.99

Boiled eggs tossed in a tangy Indo-Chinese chili sauce — a fiery twist on comfort.
Chilli Chicken

$14.99

Crispy Indo-Chinese chicken coated in a spicy chili garlic sauce.
Chicken 65 Dry

$14.99

Crispy, spicy, and iconic — the original South Indian chicken starter.
Chicken Majestic

$14.99

Crispy strips of chicken tossed in a creamy, spicy sauce — majestic indeed!
Chicken Pepper Fry

$14.99

Aromatic South-style pepper chicken with roasted curry leaves and black pepper heat.
Chicken Manchurian

$14.99

Indo-Chinese fusion favorite — crispy chicken tossed in tangy soy-chili sauce.
Hyd Chicken 65 Wet

$14.99

A juicy, saucy twist to the classic Chicken 65 — bursting with Hyderabad spice.
Chicken Lollipop

$15.99

Crispy lollipop chicken glazed in spicy sauce — juicy inside, crunchy outside.
Hell of Chicken Drums

$15.99

Drumsticks coated in fiery marinade — spicy, smoky, and dangerously addictive.
Chicken 555

$15.99

A crowd-favorite spicy dry chicken with crunchy texture and rich masala coating.
Kothimeera Chicken

$15.99

Juicy chicken tossed with fresh coriander, chili, and house masala — fresh and zesty.
Ginger Chicken

$15.99

Tender chicken bites tossed in a flavorful ginger-garlic masala.
Garlic Chicken

$15.99

Soft chicken chunks glazed in garlic sauce — aromatic and satisfying.
Andhra Kodi Vepudu (Bone-In)

$15.99

Traditional spicy chicken roast with bones — rustic, bold, and full of aroma.
Andhra Kodi Vepudu (Boneless)

$16.99

Classic Andhra chicken roast cooked to perfection — tender and fiery.
Mirapakaya Kodi Vepudu

$15.99

A spicy dry chicken roast infused with green chilies and Andhra-style seasoning.
Natu Kodi Roast

$17.99

Traditional country chicken slow-roasted with signature Andhra masalas.
Mutton Ghee Roast (Bone-In)

$17.99

Bone-in mutton slow-roasted with ghee and fiery red masala — a royal treat.
Mutton Ghee Roast (Boneless)

$19.99

Succulent mutton roasted in ghee and Mangalorean spices — rich and aromatic.
Gongura Mamsam Fry (Bone-In)

$17.99

Tangy gongura leaves meet spicy mutton — Andhra-style perfection.
Gongura Mamsam Fry (Boneless)

$19.99

Tender mutton roasted with gongura (sorrel leaves) — tangy, spicy, and unforgettable.
Mutton Sukka (Bone-In)

$17.99

Traditional dry mutton fry with a coarse masala and rustic South flavor.
Mutton Sukka (Boneless)

$19.99

Boneless mutton roasted with coconut and coarse spices — a perfect bar-style starter.
Palnadu Mamsam Roast (Bone-In)

$17.99

Classic Palnadu-style mutton fry — spicy, smoky, and ghee-rich.
Palnadu Mamsam Roast (Boneless)

$19.99

Authentic Palnadu-style dry mutton roast with ghee and local masalas.
Mutton Pepper Fry (Bone-In)

$17.99

Mutton roasted with freshly ground pepper and coconut bits — bold and meaty.
Mutton Pepper Fry (Boneless)

$19.99

Tender mutton tossed with pepper masala and ghee — spicy, earthy, and rich.
Fish 65

$16.99

Golden-fried fish bites tossed in spicy 65 masala — crisp, spicy, and flavorful.
Apollo Fish

$16.99

Crispy fish tossed in Indo-Chinese spices — juicy, bold, and full of heat.
Schezwan Chilli Fish

$16.99

Crispy fish in spicy Schezwan sauce — a must-try Indo-Chinese favorite.
DD Spl Cilantro Fish

$16.99

Pan-seared fish flavored with fresh cilantro and South Indian spices.
Black Pepper Prawns

$17.99

Prawns stir-fried with cracked pepper and curry leaves — bold and aromatic.
Loose Prawns

$17.99

Lightly battered prawns stir-fried with onions, garlic, and green chilies.
Godavari Fish Fry

$20.99

Coastal-style fried fish marinated in tangy masala and shallow-fried to golden perfection.
Shrimp Majestic

$17.99

Crispy shrimp tossed in a creamy, spicy Andhra-style sauce.
Chilli Shrimp

$17.99

Crispy shrimp tossed in a bold Indo-Chinese chili sauce with peppers.
Shrimp Fry

$17.99

Pan-fried shrimp tossed with house spices and curry leaves — coastal perfection.
Karivepaaku Kodi

$14.99

Crispy chicken cooked with curry leaf tempering — full of aroma and crunch.
Karampodi Kodi

$14.99

Signature Guntur-style chicken fry dusted with fiery karampodi spice powder.

Kebab & Tandooris

Tangdi Kebab

$16.99

Juicy drumsticks marinated overnight and flame-grilled for smoky perfection.
Chicken Seekh Kebab

$16.99

Minced chicken mixed with herbs and spices, skewered and grilled to perfection.
Chicken Chapli

$16.99

Spicy minced chicken patties shallow-fried — a North Indian street-style favorite.
Chicken Hariyali

$16.99

Green-marinated chicken rich in mint and coriander — fresh and flavorful.
Murg Malai Kebab

$16.99

Creamy, velvety chicken kebabs that melt in your mouth with every bite.
Tandoori Chicken Wild Wings

$17.99

Smoky tandoori-marinated wings grilled to perfection — bold, juicy, and absolutely irresistible!
Tawa Fish

$18.99

Pan-seared fish cooked with house spices for a bold and zesty flavor.
Tandoori Jinga

$19.99

Succulent jumbo prawns grilled with a smoky tandoori punch.
Tandoori Pomfret

$19.99

Whole pomfret marinated in spicy tandoori masala — grilled crisp and flavorful.
Pathar Ka Gosht (Goat)

$20.99

Traditional Hyderabadi-style goat slices cooked on hot stone with signature spices.
DD Spl Non Veg Kebab Platter

$23.99

A chef’s special assortment of our best kebabs — juicy, smoky, and irresistible.
Paneer Tikka Kebab

$15.99

Chargrilled paneer with bell peppers and onions — tandoor magic on a skewer.
Makhmali Paneer Tikka

$15.99

Soft paneer cubes marinated in spiced cream and roasted till melt-in-mouth.
Chicken Tandoori

$15.99

The classic red-hot tandoori chicken — smoky, spicy, and full of flavor.
Mixed Veg Kebab (Gobi/Mushroom/Paneer/Peppers)

$16.99

A colorful mix of grilled veggies and paneer tossed with tangy masala.
Chicken Malai Kebab

$16.99

Creamy, soft chicken marinated with cheese and herbs — a royal bite.
Chicken Tikka Kebab

$16.99

Classic tandoori delight — boneless chicken infused with rich spices and charred aroma.

Naans & Breads

Roti

$2.99

Soft, homestyle whole wheat bread that pairs beautifully with all curries.
Plain Naan

$2.99

Classic tandoor-baked naan — soft, light, and perfect with every bite of gravy.
Butter Naan

$3.99

Tandoor-baked, golden naan slathered in melted butter — a crowd favorite!
Garlic Naan

$3.99

Fluffy naan roasted with fresh garlic and butter — pure aroma therapy for food lovers.
Chilli Garlic Naan

$3.99

Spicy and flavorful naan brushed with garlic butter and green chili — for the bold palate.
Cheese Naan

$3.99

Melted cheese tucked inside soft naan — indulgence in every bite.
Chilli Cheese Naan

$3.99

A cheesy naan with a hint of heat — a delicious Indo-fusion twist.
Peshwari Naan

$3.99

Sweet and nutty naan filled with coconut and dry fruits — a royal treat.
Onion Kulcha

$3.99

Stuffed with caramelized onions and spices — soft, aromatic, and addictive.
Lachha Paratha

$4.99

Buttery, multi-layered paratha that’s crisp, rich, and oh-so-satisfying.
Malabar Paratha

$4.99

Flaky, layered paratha with crisp edges and soft layers — Kerala-style indulgence.
Bread Basket

$15.99

An assorted mix of our best breads — naan, roti, paratha — a must for sharing!

Vegetarian Entrees

Dal Tadka

$12.99

Yellow lentils tempered with ghee, garlic, and cumin — simple, comforting, and loaded with homestyle flavor.
Tomato Dal

$12.99

Lentils simmered with tangy tomatoes and tempered with garlic and mustard seeds — simple yet full of flavor.
Mango Dal

$12.99

A tangy South Indian-style lentil curry with raw mango — unique, comforting, and perfectly balanced.
Palak Dal

$12.99

Lentils simmered with fresh spinach and garlic tempering — simple, healthy, and home-style comfort.
Dal Makhani

$12.99

Slow-cooked black lentils simmered overnight in butter and cream — smooth, smoky, and irresistibly rich.
Shahi Paneer

$13.99

Royal North Indian curry with paneer cooked in cashew-cream sauce — mild, creamy, and full of regal flavor.
Chana Saag

$13.99

Protein-rich chickpeas cooked in creamy spinach gravy — hearty, healthy, and delicious.
Bendi Masala

$13.99

Okra sautéed with onions, tomatoes, and Indian spices — flavorful, homestyle, and perfectly spiced.
Bendi Vepudu

$13.99

Crispy fried okra tossed with South Indian spices — dry-fried, flavorful, and the perfect side dish.
Bendi Pulusu

$13.99

Traditional Andhra-style tangy okra curry cooked in tamarind gravy — bold, flavorful, and deeply satisfying.
Kadai Bendi

$13.99

Okra cooked with peppers and tomatoes in classic Kadai masala — spicy, fresh, and full of crunch.
Chana Masala

$13.99

Chickpeas cooked in tangy tomato gravy with aromatic North Indian spices — spicy, hearty, and flavorful.
Paneer Burji Gravy

$13.99

Scrambled paneer cooked with spiced onion-tomato gravy — flavorful, rustic, and delicious with naan.
Chettinad Mushroom

$13.99

Mushrooms tossed in spicy, coconut-based Chettinad masala — hot, earthy, and packed with South Indian flavor.
Chettinad Paneer

$13.99

Paneer tossed in bold Chettinad spices and coconut gravy — fiery, flavorful, and distinctly South Indian.
Chettinad Mix Veg

$13.99

A spicy South Indian-style curry made with mixed vegetables and Chettinad masala — bold and aromatic.
Aloo Gobi

$13.99

Classic North Indian curry of potatoes and cauliflower cooked with aromatic spices — comforting and homestyle.
Aloo Palak

$13.99

Potatoes cooked in smooth spinach gravy — mild, creamy, and wholesome with every bite.
Aloo Mutter

$13.99

A comforting blend of potatoes and peas simmered in a rich, flavorful gravy.
Kadai Veg

$14.99

Mixed vegetables tossed in spicy tomato-based Kadai gravy — vibrant, flavorful, and full of zest.
Kadai Paneer

$14.99

Paneer sautéed with bell peppers, onions, and Kadai spices — smoky, spicy, and full of flavor.
Kadai Mushroom

$14.99

Tender mushrooms cooked in spicy tomato gravy with capsicum and onions — smoky and irresistibly bold.
Veg Korma

$14.99

A mix of seasonal vegetables cooked in a mildly spiced cashew-coconut gravy — rich, aromatic, and perfectly balanced.
Paneer Korma

$14.99

Paneer cubes cooked in a creamy, nut-based gravy — mild, rich, and packed with aromatic flavors.
Aloo Korma

$14.99

Soft potatoes cooked in creamy, spiced coconut-cashew gravy — mild, aromatic, and perfectly comforting.
Mushroom Korma

$14.99

Tender mushrooms cooked in creamy cashew-coconut gravy — rich, silky, and full of flavor.
Gutti Vankaya (Stuffed Brinjal)

$14.99

Tender eggplants stuffed with spicy peanut masala and slow-cooked — a true Andhra delicacy.
Punjabi Palak Paneer

$14.99

Soft paneer cooked in creamy spinach gravy with Punjabi spices — wholesome, earthy, and soul-satisfying.
Paneer Tikka Masala

$14.99

Char-grilled paneer cubes simmered in rich, spiced tomato gravy — smoky, creamy, and bursting with flavor.
Paneer Butter Masala

$14.99

Soft paneer simmered in buttery tomato gravy — mildly sweet, creamy, and everyone’s all-time favorite.
Navratan Korma

$14.99

A royal medley of nine veggies and fruits cooked in creamy gravy — rich, mildly sweet, and full of color.
Malai Kofta

$14.99

Golden-fried cottage cheese dumplings served in a luscious cashew cream sauce — rich, royal, and comforting.
Kaju Curry

$13.99

Rich and creamy curry made with cashews in spiced tomato-onion gravy — decadent and flavorful.

Jeera Rice

$8.99

Aromatic basmati rice tempered with roasted cumin seeds and ghee — simple, fragrant, and the perfect side.

$10.99

Comfort in every bite — chilled curd mixed with rice, tempered with mustard, ginger, and curry leaves.
Veg Biryani

$14.99

Aromatic basmati rice slow-cooked with fresh vegetables, mild spices, and herbs for a rich, soulful biryani experience.
Chilli Mushroom Biryani

$14.99

Spicy mushrooms tossed in chilli masala and layered with flavorful biryani rice — bold, saucy, and full of zest.
Gobi Masala Biryani

$14.99

Crispy cauliflower tossed in spicy masala and layered with aromatic rice — a bold, flavorful twist on classic biryani.
Cut Mirchi Biryani

$14.99

Crispy cut mirchi tossed in spicy masala and layered with fragrant biryani rice — fiery, crunchy, and irresistibly flavorful.
Paneer Biryani

$15.99

Soft paneer cubes layered with fragrant rice and house-blend biryani masala — rich, creamy, and irresistibly aromatic.
Jack Fruit Biryani

$15.99

Tender marinated jackfruit cooked like meat and layered with spiced, fragrant biryani rice.
Gutti Vankaya Biryani

$15.99

A Hyderabadi classic! Basmati rice cooked with stuffed brinjal and aromatic spices — smoky, spicy, and full of traditional flavor.
Ulavacharu Biryani (Veg)

$15.99

Fragrant basmati rice layered with slow-cooked horse gram (ulavacharu) gravy and mixed vegetables — earthy, rich, and authentically Andhra-style.
Ulavacharu Biryani (Paneer)

$15.99

Paneer cubes simmered in rich horse gram (ulavacharu) gravy and layered with fragrant biryani rice — earthy, creamy, and full of Andhra flavor.
Gongura Biryani (Veg)

$15.99

Zesty gongura masala cooked with fresh vegetables and aromatic rice — tangy, spicy, and authentically South Indian.
Gongura Biryani (Paneer)

$15.99

Tangy gongura (sorrel leaves) blended with paneer and layered in spicy biryani rice — a true Andhra delicacy.
Veg Keema Biryani

$15.99

Minced vegetable masala slow-cooked with aromatic basmati rice — spicy, flavorful, and a vegetarian favorite.
Paneer Keema Biryani

$15.99

Finely minced paneer cooked with robust biryani spices and layered with saffron rice — indulgent, spicy, and unique.

Egg Biryani

Ulavacharu Chicken Dum Biryani

Vijayawada Chicken Biryani (Boneless)

Gongura Chicken Biryani

Chicken Biryani (Boneless)

Chicken Fry Piece Biryani (Bone-In)

$17.99

Chicken Fry Piece Biryani (Boneless)

Crispy boneless chicken fry blended with aromatic biryani rice — every bite a burst of spice.

$18.99

$19.99

Mutton Dum Biryani

Tangy gongura and spiced mutton layered in biryani rice — Andhra-style with a twist.
Ulavacharu Mutton Dum Biryani

$19.99

Goat Kheema Biryani

$20.99

Fish Biryani

$18.99

Shrimp Fry Biryani

$18.99

Mutton Fry Piece Biryani (Bone-In)

$18.99

Bone-in mutton cooked in authentic Hyderabadi dum style — juicy, spicy, and unforgettable.
Mutton Fry Piece Biryani (Boneless)

DD Specials

Goat Haleem

$17.99

Slow-cooked to perfection — tender goat blended with wheat, lentils, and aromatic spices. Creamy, hearty, and rich in authentic Hyderabadi flavor.
DD Chef’s Special Tawa Fish

$19.99

Bone-in fish fillet seared to perfection with Chef’s signature masala — crisp outside, soft inside, and bursting with flavor.
Nalli Gosht Roast

$20.99

Tender lamb shanks slow-roasted in rich gravy — fall-off-the-bone perfection loaded with royal Hyderabadi taste.
DD Chef’s Special Tawa Fish (Boneless)

$20.99

Fresh boneless fish grilled on a hot tawa with house-blend spices — smoky, juicy, and absolutely addictive.

DD Family Packs

To go only

Veg Biryani Family Pack

$40

Aromatic basmati rice cooked with fresh vegetables, mint, and traditional spices.
Paneer Biryani Family Pack

$50

Soft paneer cubes cooked in fragrant biryani masala and layered with saffron rice.
Egg Dum Biryani Family Pack

$40.99

Fluffy basmati rice layered with spiced boiled eggs and aromatic masala.
Hyd Chicken Dum Biryani Family Pack

$45

Classic Hyderabadi dum biryani — aromatic basmati rice layered with tender chicken.
Ulavacharu Chicken Dum Biryani Family Pack

$47.99

Tender chicken layered with biryani rice and simmered in authentic ulavacharu gravy.
Vijayawada Boneless Biryani Family Pack

$55

A fiery South Indian special with boneless chicken cooked in bold masala.
DD Spl Chicken Biryani Family Pack

$55

Our signature Desi Dhamaka special — juicy chicken, aromatic rice, and secret spices.
Ulavacharu Chicken Boneless Biryani Family Pack

$56

Boneless chicken cooked in rich horse gram (ulavacharu) gravy and layered with biryani rice.
Ulavacharu Goat Dum Biryani Family Pack

$61

Slow-cooked goat meat infused with earthy ulavacharu flavors — a rich Andhra-style biryani.
Goat Dum Biryani Family Pack

$60

Traditional Hyderabadi-style dum biryani with tender goat meat and fragrant basmati rice.
Shrimp Biryani Family Pack

$60

Succulent shrimp simmered in spiced biryani masala and layered with long-grain rice.
Mamsam Roast Biryani Family Pack

$60

Tender boneless mutton roasted in rich masala and layered with aromatic biryani rice.
Gongura Biryani Family Pack

$45

Zesty gongura masala cooked with fresh vegetables and aromatic rice — tangy and spicy.
JackFruit Biryani Family Pack

$45

Tender marinated jackfruit cooked like meat and layered with spiced, fragrant biryani rice.
FryPiece Chicken Biryani Family Pack

$55

Aromatic basmati rice layered with chicken fry pieces — a true Desi Dhamaka signature.
Goat FryPiece Biryani Family Pack

$60

Tender mutton pieces fried and mixed with spiced rice — rich, flavorful, and indulgent.
Goat Boneless Biryani Family Pack

$62

Indo Chinese

Veg Noodles

$11.99

Soft noodles tossed with colorful vegetables and house-made sauces — light, flavorful, and satisfying.
Egg Noodles

$11.99

Stir-fried noodles with scrambled egg, soy, and veggies — perfect for egg lovers!
Chicken Noodles

$11.99

Classic stir-fried noodles with tender chicken and crunchy veggies — comforting and full of taste.
Veg Fried Rice

$12.99

Simple yet delicious — wok-tossed rice loaded with veggies and authentic Indo-Chinese flavors.
Egg Fried Rice

$12.99

Fluffy rice blended with scrambled eggs, veggies, and spices — a delicious quick meal.
Chicken Fried Rice

$12.99

Aromatic rice wok-tossed with juicy chicken, egg, and veggies — the ultimate comfort meal.
Veg Schezwan Fried Rice

$13.99

Wok-tossed rice infused with chili-garlic Schezwan sauce and crunchy vegetables.
Egg Schezwan Fried Rice

$13.99

Egg fried rice meets Schezwan spice — bold, saucy, and unforgettable!
Chicken Schezwan Fried Rice

$13.99

Spicy Schezwan rice bursting with flavors of garlic, chili, and tender chicken.
Schezwan Shrimp Fried Rice

$15.99

Spicy, zesty rice with shrimp and Schezwan sauce — a fiery twist for seafood lovers.
Shrimp Fried Rice

$15.99

Juicy shrimp tossed with rice, soy, and aromatic spices — ocean-fresh goodness in every bite.
Street Food Fried Rice

$15.99

Inspired by Indian street flavors — smoky, spicy, and irresistibly tasty in every bite!
Chicken Hakka Noodles

$13.99

Stir-fried noodles tossed with succulent chicken, veggies, and signature Indo-Chinese flavors.
Veg Hakka Noodles

$11.99

Stir-fried noodles tossed with crunchy veggies and Indo-Chinese seasonings for a tasty, street-style treat.
Egg Hakka Noodles

$12.99

Stir-fried noodles tossed with fluffy eggs, veggies, and flavorful Indo-Chinese seasoning.

Snacks

Roasted Peanut Masala

$8.99

Crispy roasted peanuts mixed with zesty masala — perfect for crunchy cravings.
Samosa

$8.99

Crispy pastry stuffed with spiced potatoes — the all-time favorite Indian snack.
Cut Mirchi

$9.99

Crispy fried green chilies sliced and seasoned to perfection — bold, spicy, and addictive!
Mirchi Bajji

$9.99

Street-style hot chili fritters coated in gram flour — crunchy outside, soft inside.
Kaju Fry

$13.99

Crunchy cashews tossed with pepper and house spices — a royal and irresistible snack.
Egg Bonda (3 Pcs)

$10.99

Boiled eggs dipped in spiced batter and fried golden brown — crispy, rich, and satisfying.

Chai & Coffee

Masala Chai

$1.99

A comforting blend of tea, milk, and Indian spices — a cup of warmth in every sip.
Irani Chai

$2.99

Traditional Hyderabad-style tea — strong, creamy, and irresistibly aromatic.
Desi Chai

$1.99

A warm, aromatic cup of traditional Indian chai brewed with bold spices.
Instant Coffee (Bru)

$2.99

Quick, strong, and smooth — India’s favorite instant coffee delight.
Iyengar Filter Coffee

$3.99

South Indian-style filter coffee, brewed to perfection with rich aroma and flavor.

Soft Drinks

Butter Milk

$3.99

Cool, spiced yogurt drink — refreshing and perfect after a hearty meal.
Mango Lassi

$4.99

Rich and creamy yogurt drink blended with ripe mangoes — a perfect desi cooler.
Sweet Lassi

$4.99

Creamy, sweet, and soothing — a traditional Indian favorite.
Salt Lassi

$4.99

A savory yogurt drink that cools you from the inside out.
Fresh Lemon Soda

$3.99

Freshly squeezed lemon with sparkling soda — sweet, salty, or both!
Goli Soda

$3.99

Old-school Indian soda pop — fun, fizzy, and full of nostalgia!
Thumps Up Can

$2.99

India’s bold cola with a strong, fizzy kick — perfect with spicy dishes!
Topo Chico

$3.99

The premium sparkling mineral water with a crisp, refreshing fizz.
Poland Spring Water Bottle

$0.99

Fresh, clean water to keep you cool and refreshed.
Coke Can

$1.99

The timeless favorite — fizzy, cool, and always satisfying.
Coke Bottle (20oz)

$3.99

Refreshing, bubbly Coke served chilled for the perfect sip with any meal.
Diet Coke Can

$1.99

Light, bubbly, and refreshing — zero calories, all the flavor.
Diet Coke Bottle

$3.99

All the Diet Coke taste in a chilled bottle — zero calories, full fizz.
Zero Coke Can

$1.99

All the Coca-Cola taste with none of the sugar.
Zero Coke Bottle

$3.99

Zero sugar, full Coca-Cola flavor — now in a bottle.
Sprite Can

$1.99

Crisp lemon-lime fizz that hits refresh instantly.
Ginger Ale Can

$1.99

Light, bubbly ginger ale with a crisp, clean taste.
Limca Can

$2.99

Zesty lemon-lime Indian soda — light, tangy, and refreshing.
Canada Dry Can

$1.99

Smooth and crisp ginger ale — the classic go-to mixer and refresher.
Sprite Bottle

$3.99

Lemon-lime refreshment in a chilled bottle — crisp and satisfying.
Ginger Ale Bottle

$3.99

Smooth ginger ale served in a chilled bottle — perfect with any meal.
Mexican Coke

$4.99

Made with real cane sugar — richer, smoother, and extra delicious!
Canada Dry

$2.99

Classic ginger ale in a bottle — light, bubbly, and refreshingly smooth.
Limca

$2.99

Tangy lemon-lime Indian soda — refreshing and full of zest.
Smart Water

$3.99

Hydration with a hint of purity — stay smart, stay refreshed.
Topo Chico Can

$2.99

Crisp sparkling mineral water in a convenient can — refreshing fizz on the go.

Kids Menu

French Fries

$8.99

Crispy golden fries served hot — the ultimate kid-favorite snack!
Chicken Nuggets

$10.99

Tender, juicy chicken bites coated in a crunchy golden crust — fun to eat and full of flavor.
DD Mini Kulcha

$10.99

Soft, buttery mini kulchas served with mild curry — a delightful desi treat made just for little tummies!

Desserts

Ice Cream

$5.99

Chilled scoops of creamy delight — the perfect finish to your meal.
Gulab Jamun

$5.99

Soft, golden dumplings soaked in warm sugar syrup — a timeless Indian classic.
Rasmalai

$5.99

Soft cheese patties soaked in creamy, saffron milk — melt-in-mouth perfection.
Carrot Halwa

$6.99

Slow-cooked carrots in milk and ghee, topped with nuts — pure indulgence.
Double Ka Meetha

$7.99

Hyderabadi bread pudding made with ghee, milk, and saffron — rich and royal.
Sorakaya Halwa

$7.99

Delicately flavored bottle gourd halwa — light, rich, and wholesome.
Gummadikaya Halwa

$7.99

A healthy twist on tradition — earthy pumpkin cooked in milk and ghee.
DD Special Sweet

$11.99

Chef’s special house dessert — a sweet surprise worth saving room for.
Beetroot Halwa

$7.99

A healthy twist on tradition — earthy beetroot cooked in milk and ghee.
Icecream Gulabjamun

$5.99

Warm gulab jamun paired with cold ice cream — a heavenly fusion dessert.

Thali

Veg Thali

$18.99

A wholesome South Indian platter with flavorful curries, dal, rice, roti, and sweets — a symphony of flavors.
Non Veg Thali

$21.99

A hearty feast featuring signature meat curries, rice, roti, and sides — crafted for true food lovers.

Authentic Indian flavors, sizzling biryanis, mandi, kebabs, and traditional favorites served fresh every day in the heart of Oak Tree, Edison.
